title: Malindi, Kilifi — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Malindi, Kilifi: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Malindi is a city in Kilifi with a population of 118,000. A coastal resort town in southeastern Kenya, known for its beautiful beaches, coral reefs, and historic Portuguese architecture.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
